SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Armor
Armor class for the armor the player will use modifying the ac and adding to the ac of an Entity class (currently only player)
Cheats
enums for cheats to modify the game using hp, gold, modifier, dice count, ac and luck.
Color
enum for colors
ColorConfig
Color configuration checks if the users have a terminal ie console
Enemy
Enemy class for battles.
Entity
Entity class parant to the enemy and player class
Feat
The feat enum is for the diffrent feats in the game they Are based on name, descriotion, category and rarity.
Fight
the fight method main controller of the game handle game loop combat flow and shop interactions
Item
Item class for potions and revives
Player
The player class the user playing this class it extend the Entity class
Shop
A shop class for the player to visit and buy items, weapons and armor
Weapon
Weapon class for spawning, creating and modifying wepons
